microsoft_ft: Architected Azure's recovery validation program from a **2-person operation into a scalable automation platform**, standardizing workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and delivering **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise partners.

Led 0→1 design and deployment of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining self-service scheduling requirements and SAP-integrated workflows that **reduced operational toil by 30%** across cross-functional engineering teams.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a rack-level drill program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a continuous validation standard.

Directed 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility, including a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a **$1.5B+ enterprise contract**, coordinating scope, timeline, and change control across stakeholders.

Scaled team leverage via **AI-driven automation**, building an internal AI agent that restructured planning workflows, reduced planning cycle time by 39%, and increased drill capacity by 21% without additional headcount.
microsoft_2023: Championed adoption of **AI-driven automation workflows**, conducting user demos and training sessions that drove utilization across 14 key engineering teams and eliminated 37 hours of monthly manual effort in code generation pipelines.

Shaped the automation roadmap by facilitating 11+ user interviews with Azure service teams, identifying critical feature gaps and influencing the inclusion of **intent-based YAML generation** to reduce non-value-added configuration tasks.

Optimized data integrity and retrieval speed by migrating documentation to an AI-powered semantic search tool with rigorous metadata standards, **cutting lookup time by 83%** and improving operational efficiency across service teams.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework spanning 140+ teams across IT, logistics, and engineering.

Drove operational excellence by conducting discovery with 20+ service teams to surface **81 hours of manual effort** per region launch, then built a scalable automation roadmap to eliminate repetitive, non-value-added tasks.

Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** to track operational toil across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to identify automation gaps, prioritize high-value programs, and align investment with cost-reduction objectives.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit warehouse automation pilot by defining the legacy OS migration strategy and mapping system dependencies across 1,200+ stations with full change-control compliance.

Drove strategic alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and supporting scalable rollout of robotics control systems.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, prioritizing the backlog to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets** and stabilize the developer intake process for warehouse automation deployments.

Collaborated cross-functionally to establish quality metrics and system compliance standards at automated audit stations, ensuring deployed robotics solutions met **operational excellence and safety benchmarks**.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by optimizing end-to-end scoping and invoicing workflows for 200+ monthly proposals through a new CRM integration, reducing manual processing and improving order-cycle accuracy.

Reduced Customer Acquisition Cost by **13%** and boosted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing web presence and automating lead-funnel touchpoints to cut non-value-added steps.

Improved leadership pricing models by conducting **financial profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records, identifying margin leaks and delivering data-driven recommendations to optimize cost and operational efficiency.

tailoring_notes: 'operational excellence' woven into amazon_robotics bullet#4 and microsoft_2022 bullet#2, directly mirroring JD's stated goal of driving operational excellence via quality metrics at automated audit stations.

'non-value-added tasks/activities' language from JD's Objectives section appears in microsoft_2022 bullet#2 and pro_painters bullet#2, aligning Cyrus's work to the JD's explicit cost-reduction framing.

'change control' and 'SAP-integrated workflows' from JD's GIS/SAP requirements surfaced in microsoft_ft bullet#4 and microsoft_ft bullet#2 respectively, showing direct fluency with Applied Materials' governance standards.

'cross-functional alignment' across IT, logistics, and engineering mirrored in microsoft_2022 bullet#1 and amazon_robotics bullet#2, echoing the JD's explicit call for collaboration across IT, logistics, manufacturing, and operations.
'automated audit stations' and 'quality metrics' vocabulary from the JD embedded in amazon_robotics bullet#4 to directly match the warehouse automation context of the role.
